status: proposed additions, provisional ids, governance assigns final ids

skills.name: Difference Detection
skills.description: Identify the specific correspondences and conflicts between two observations and decide whether they refer to the same thing.
skills.boundary: Distinct from knowing which features count, this performs the side-by-side comparison itself.
skills.anchor: Find 1-3 identifying features that should match for the same entity ... Pick a verdict based on whether those features actually match.
skills.rationale: The central producing act every item runs on, the comparison that yields the decision, weighted top.

skills.name: Domain Reasoning
skills.description: Apply the correct category-specific criteria that define identity for the case at hand and exclude criteria that do not apply.
skills.boundary: Distinct from the act of comparing, this supplies and selects the standard the comparison must use.
skills.anchor: Read the entity type and label at the top, they tell you which match criteria apply ... These are the only signals that establish identity.
skills.rationale: Decisive throughout, the bulk of the work is choosing and applying the right identity standard per category, and the wrong standard collapses the result.

skills.name: Evidential Objectivity
skills.description: Base each judgment only on legitimate visible evidence, resisting superficial resemblance and declining to infer attributes that are not actually shown.
skills.boundary: Distinct from knowing the criteria, this resists distractors and refuses to invent evidence that is not present.
skills.anchor: Do NOT use their outfit, the background ... Same breed is not same animal. This is the #1 mistake ... don't pretend it's missing; downgrade to Likely or Skip.
skills.rationale: Central and the source of the most common errors, holding judgment to the valid visible signal rather than the salient but irrelevant one.

skills.name: Confidence Calibration
skills.description: Match the degree of certainty expressed to the strength and clarity of the available evidence, and withhold a decision when the evidence is balanced.
skills.boundary: Distinct from making the match decision, this assigns how sure to be and when to abstain rather than guess.
skills.anchor: Definitely, the identifying feature is clearly visible ... Likely, leaves room for doubt ... Coin-flip uncertainty, that is a Skip, not a likely.
skills.rationale: A core dimension of the work with its own section, mismatched certainty is a graded quality failure on its own.

skills.name: Input Validation
skills.description: Recognize when the source material is itself invalid or unverifiable and route it for rejection rather than rendering a judgment on it.
skills.boundary: Distinct from abstaining on a hard but legitimate case, this detects a broken source that no one should attempt to judge.
skills.anchor: Flag as Bad Data, the source itself is broken ... watermarks ... same image ... A photo cannot verify itself ... Don't flag just because the answer is hard, that's what Skip is for.
skills.rationale: A distinct gating ability separating an unusable source from a merely difficult case, protecting downstream data integrity.

skills.name: Explanatory Writing
skills.description: State the specific evidence behind a decision so an independent reviewer can audit the reasoning rather than only the outcome.
skills.boundary: Distinct from reaching the decision, this makes the decision's basis legible to a later reader.
skills.anchor: Write a short reason naming the features you used. Generic reasons score poorly ... if you removed the verdict from your reason, a reviewer should still be able to guess what you decided.
skills.rationale: One of two co-equal scored dimensions, the legibility of the justification is graded directly and weighted high.

skills.name: Scope Discipline
skills.description: Confine evaluation to the designated portion of the field and exclude everything outside the mandated boundary.
skills.boundary: Distinct from choosing which attributes matter, this fixes which region is in play at all.
skills.anchor: Look at the yellow box first. That is the only thing being verified on the target side ... Ignore prints outside the box. Use whatever's inside the box.
skills.rationale: A separable spatial-targeting ability whose failure compares the wrong region and silently corrupts the result, learnable quickly so weighted mid.

flags: Merged distractor suppression and occluded-evidence honesty into Evidential Objectivity, both anchor judgment to the valid visible signal and did not dissociate strongly enough to score apart.
Omitted a standalone Sustained Focus competency, the queued repeated context is implied structurally but no span exercises long-haul endurance or cross-item standard-holding with its own evidence.

Considered merging Scope Discipline into Evidential Objectivity, kept separate because spatial region-scoping and attribute-level distractor suppression have distinct spans and distinct failure modes.
